name: Ultroid Optimized
description: Self-hosted Telegram userbot framework. Supports userbot, bot-only, and dual mode.

SESSION.description: Telethon string session. Generate via python3 ssgen.py. Not required for RUNTIME_MODE=bot.

BOT_TOKEN.description: Bot token from @BotFather. Required for RUNTIME_MODE=bot or dual.

RUNTIME_MODE.description: dual (default) | user | bot. Controls which clients are started.

LOG_CHANNEL.description: Telegram channel ID for startup cards and alerts.

GROQ_API_KEY.description: API key from console.groq.com for AI features (.ask, .search).

REDIS_URI.description: Redis connection URI. Leave empty to use local JSON database.

MONGO_URI.description: MongoDB connection URI. Alternative to Redis.

HEROKU_API.description: Heroku API token. Required only for Heroku deployment.

HEROKU_APP_NAME.description: Heroku app name. Required only for Heroku deployment.
